title: Full Service Event Production

seo.title: Event Production Services — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox provides full-service event production including planning, logistics, AV equipment sourcing, tour and production management, venue sourcing, permit submittal, and on-site labor.

og.title: Full Service Event Production — BEATROX
og.description: From first concept to final strike — Beatrox manages every layer of your event including AV, logistics, labor, venue, and production management.

hero.headline: Full Service Event Production
hero.subheadline: From first concept to final strike, we manage every layer of your event — so you can focus on your audience.

capabilities: Labor Hire Roles: TD, PM, A1 A2, V1 V2, L1, L2

body.content: Beatrox is a full-service event production partner. Whether you're producing a brand activation, a touring concert, an experiential pop-up, or a corporate event, our team handles everything — from pre-production planning to on-site technical direction and final strike.

body.heading: Why Choose Beatrox
items: 15+ years of experience in live event production
Full-service team from design to strike
Trusted by Adidas, Netflix, CNN, Amazon Music

body.heading: Our Process
items: 1. Discovery Call — We learn your vision, venue, and budget
2. Design & Pre-Visualization — See your event before it happens
3. Equipment & Crew — We source everything and assign the right team
4. On-Site Execution — Professional setup, operation, and strike
5. Post-Event Review — We ensure everything exceeded expectations

body.heading: What We Handle
body.content: Our production team serves as your single point of contact, managing AV equipment sourcing and rentals, venue coordination, labor hiring, permit submittal, and day-of execution. We have deep experience with complex logistics across multiple formats and venue types, and we bring a seasoned network of production professionals to every project.

body.heading: Labor Roles Explained
body.content: Technical Director (TD) oversees all technical systems and ensures design integrity. Production Manager (PM) handles scheduling, budgeting, and vendor coordination. A1 is the Front of House audio engineer mixing the show; A2 manages monitor mixes and wireless systems. V1 operates the main video/screens; V2 manages playback, cameras, and switcher. L1 is the Lighting Director designing and calling cues; L2 assists with programming and fixture focus. Crew Chief leads the load-in/load-out crew. Beatrox provides the right talent for every role.

body.heading: Venue Coordination & Timeline Examples
body.content: Successful events depend on tight venue coordination. We create detailed production timelines — from load-in schedules and power distribution plans to security briefings and strike timelines. For a typical 500-person concert, we plan 8 hours of load-in, 2 hours of soundcheck, a 4-hour event window, and 4 hours of strike. For brand activations, we coordinate with venue managers on foot traffic, power drops, and permitting. Our timelines keep every vendor, artist, and venue aligned.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for standard rentals and 8–12 weeks for custom productions. Last-minute requests are often accommodated depending on availability.

items.question: Do you travel outside Portland?
items.answer: Absolutely. While we're headquartered in Portland, OR, we regularly serve clients across the West Coast and nationwide for touring and large-scale events.

items.question: What's included in the rental?
items.answer: Every rental includes delivery, setup, on-site technical support, and strike. Custom packages can also include content design, pre-visualization, and dedicated project management.

items.question: Can you manage the entire event?
items.answer: Yes. Our full-service production management includes planning, logistics, vendor coordination, labor hiring, venue sourcing, permitting, and day-of execution. We act as your single point of contact.

items.question: Do you handle permits and insurance?
items.answer: We manage permit submittal for noise, fire, parking, and special events. We also carry comprehensive liability insurance and can provide certificates of insurance for venues.
